title: The Girl of Gold
writer: Anna Alice Chapin, Kate Corbaley, Cleveland Moffett
actors: Florence Vidor, Malcolm McGregor, Alan Roscoe
plot: Helen Merrimore, the daughter of a mine owner, is snubbed by New York society. Weary of being courted for her wealth, she attends under an assumed name a house party being given by Ned and Edith Loring. There she falls in love wit...
